body_transformation: The shell transforms into a textured obsidian surface with jagged, shadowy ridges etching its surface, while the white and gray accents become deep ebony crimson veins. The rounded head retains its shape but gains shadowy fur along the jawline and pointed ears now feature tattered, jagged edges. The compact body silhouette remains intact, but the smooth blue skin is replaced with matte charcoal gray fur, subtly textured with shadowy translucency in the limbs. The curled tail tip now bears spiky dark fur patterns, maintaining its original curve but appearing more menacing.
signature_feature: Shell ridges: jagged obsidian with deep ebony crimson veins and shadowy translucency.
